The '''mission to Endor''' took place during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==The mission==
[[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] and [[Clone Marshal Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Bly/Legends|Bly]] were sent to investigate a deserted [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Unidentified droid outpost|outpost]] in the [[Endor system/Legends|Endor system]], after a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] [[Squad/Legends|squad]] went missing. The group found evidence of a struggle, but no clone trooper bodies were there; only their armor.

Aayla Secura went searching for the missing squad of clones when a [[Unidentified B1 battle droid (Endor)|B1 battle droid]] ambushed her. Aayla quickly subdued the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] by slicing both of its arms and legs with her [[Aayla Secura's lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. While questioning the droid about the missing squad of clones, an [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] shot a [[Tranquilizer dart/Legends|tranquilizer dart]] in her neck.

Aayla awoke to find herself tied up. She asked the droid what was happening, and the droid replied sarcastically that the Ewoks were going to eat her. A few minutes later, the Ewok leader pointed at a picture of the beast in the mouth of the mountain. The battle droid translated, saying that they thought she was a [[Deity/Legends|goddess]] and were asking her to slay the beast in the mountain.

It later turned out a [[Beast in the Mouth of the Mountain|giant beast]] killed all the clone troopers and destroyed all the Separatist droids. However, Secura was able to kill the creature, but the mouthy B1 battle droid was crushed.

Following this mission, Secura departed for [[Felucia/Legends|Felucia]] wondering why the Separatists were building outposts on such remote [[Planet/Legends|planets]].
